## Release Summary

## Scope

- Base branch: `main`
- Head branch: `develop`
- Release type: `patch` | `minor` | `major`

## How To Verify

<!-- Commands run + key smoke checks for release confidence -->

# Release Checklist

If an item is not applicable, check the box and append `N/A: <reason>`.

## 1. Release Readiness

- [ ] Versioning/release metadata is correct for included changes.
- [ ] Changelog/release notes are accurate and reviewer-readable.
- [ ] Required CI checks are green for the release commit range.
- [ ] No known blockers remain open for this release.

## 2. Validation and Risk

- [ ] Core user flows were smoke-tested in docs/app/package outputs.
- [ ] Any migration or rollout notes are documented.
- [ ] Rollback plan is clear if post-release issues are found.
- [ ] Follow-up work is captured as issues/tickets.

## Optional Notes

- Reviewer focus:
  - `<highest-risk area>`
  - `<second-risk area>`
- Out of scope:
  - `<explicitly not covered in this release>`
